name: Italian Wedding Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Spinach leaves, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground meat, bread crumbs, egg, parsley, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Mix well and form into small meat balls.
2. Bake the meatballs on a cookie sheet for 30 minutes at 350°F.
3. Meanwhile, bring the chicken broth to a boil. Add the spinach and cover. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add the meatballs to the hot broth. Bring to a simmer.
5. Stir in the grated Pecorino Romano cheese and serve immediately.
